content: nixpkgs/NixOS is looking into packaging and then having an option to enable the rust for linux kernel. https://github.com/NixOS/nixpkgs/pull/272029

Thanks @Finn Behrens, that is very useful to know.

I see it is opt-in and that the changes require do not seem too bad, which is nice to see :)
Thanks to blitz and yu-re-ka for working on those, too!

You're welcome! The packaging effort is also a bit in a chicken and egg situation, because there are no real users yet. But then it's hard to be a user if trying everything out is hard, because it's not packaged :)
